task: D-3 - Merchant Center Feed Diagnostics And Product Policy Approval

official_sources.title: Product data specification
official_sources.used_for: Feed attributes, price/availability/shipping/returns, VAT, and product-data quality requirements

official_sources.title: Availability [availability]
official_sources.used_for: Availability truth, landing-page and checkout consistency, and disapproval risk for false in-stock offers

official_sources.title: GTIN [gtin]
official_sources.used_for: Identifier policy and not guessing GTINs

official_sources.title: Merchant listing structured data
official_sources.used_for: Product/Offer schema alignment with visible price, availability, shipping, and return data

official_sources.title: Misrepresentation
official_sources.used_for: Truthful merchant identity, contact, pricing, shipping, return, availability, and customer-consent policy

official_sources.title: Website claiming
official_sources.used_for: Merchant Center website ownership evidence requirement

official_sources.title: Account access
official_sources.used_for: Merchant Center account access/readback evidence requirement

limitations: No Merchant Center account ID, owner/access evidence, claimed website status, feed/data source status, item diagnostics, account issues, product status, or shipping/return settings export was available.
Merchant Center readiness cannot be inferred from local XML validation alone.
Production feed URL currently returns HTML instead of XML, so a Merchant Center data source pointed at the public URL would not receive the local feed body.

local_feed_summary.vat_policy: Local generator multiplies ex-VAT source prices by 1.255 and emits VAT-inclusive EUR prices.

local_gate_results.evidence: Merchant feed check passed: 31528 items in merchant-products.xml.
Product UI, Product/Offer schema, Merchant feed shipping, cart, checkout, and product mapping use the shared commerce contract.
Source static asset check passed with merchant-products.xml size 36405465 bytes and merchantItems 31528.
31528 items, 31528 GTINs, 31528 in-stock offers, 0 out-of-stock offers, 31528 new-condition offers, and 31528 FI shipping entries at 50.00 EUR.

live_results.expected: 200 application/xml or text/xml body containing Google Merchant RSS XML
live_results.impact: Merchant Center data source fetch from production would receive the SPA/Figma shell instead of the feed.
Product URL discovery parity remains broken alongside the Merchant feed.

source_findings: Product/Offer schema includes price, availability, shippingDetails, merchant return policy, GTIN/SKU/MPN, and inventory level from the shared commerce snapshot.
Checkout sends client unit price cents, GTIN, SKU, stock quantity, and delivery-day range for server-side revalidation.

Feed generator emits canonical slug URLs, VAT-inclusive EUR price, in stock/out of stock availability, new condition, GTIN when normalized, MPN, Google product category, product_type, and FI shipping 50.00 EUR.
Product detail copy tells users price, stock, and delivery can change as supplier/catalog data updates and that cart/checkout revalidate price and availability before payment.
Legal policy copy includes delivery, return, warranty, supplier-stock, and liability statements that still require owner/legal approval for Merchant Center policy parity.

findings.title: Merchant Center authenticated diagnostics unavailable
findings.evidence: Project wrapper has no Merchant Center account ID, Merchant ID, Google credential status, public base URL, or sanitized provider export.
findings.impact: D-3 cannot confirm website claim, data source URL, last fetch, item count, processing status, needs-attention issues, disapprovals, account issues, program eligibility, shipping/return settings, automatic item updates, or Merchant performance.
findings.required_resolution: Provide account access or sanitized Merchant Center export/API evidence.

findings.title: Production Merchant feed URL returns HTML
findings.evidence: https://www.mitra-auto.fi/merchant-products.xml returns 200 text/html and body starts with Created in Figma Make.
findings.impact: Merchant Center cannot reliably ingest the local feed from production until the canonical host serves the XML asset before SPA fallback.
findings.required_resolution: Deploy repo static asset routing or equivalent provider rule so the live feed returns 200 application/xml and the expected RSS body.

findings.title: Product policy approval unavailable
findings.evidence: Local source defines 50.00 EUR FI shipping, 14-day return window, checkout price/stock revalidation, fitment caveats, and legal warranty/delivery language, but no owner/legal/product approval is recorded.
findings.impact: Feed/schema/cart/checkout parity cannot be called Merchant-ready until the business confirms shipping, pickup, installation, return, warranty, used-condition, stock, delivery, and fitment rules.
findings.required_resolution: Approve the product policy source of truth and update feed/schema/cart/checkout/legal copy if any value changes.

findings.title: All emitted feed offers are in stock and new condition
findings.evidence: Local feed summary found 31528 in-stock items, 0 out-of-stock items, and 31528 new-condition items.
findings.impact: This is acceptable only if supplier/CMS data and checkout revalidation prove those products are genuinely purchasable as new. False stock or wrong condition can trigger disapprovals and customer harm.
findings.required_resolution: Confirm inventory source freshness, supplier-stock semantics, reservation behavior, and used/unique-item exclusion or separate lifecycle policy.

findings.title: GTIN presence is high but GTIN authority is not proven
findings.evidence: Local feed has 31528 GTIN values; source normalizes 8-14 digit values but does not itself prove GS1 correctness.
findings.impact: Incorrect GTINs can limit visibility or trigger item issues even when the feed parser passes.
findings.required_resolution: Verify GTIN provenance from supplier/CMS data and use Merchant Center item diagnostics to catch invalid identifiers.

required_merchant_center_evidence: Merchant Center account ID, account owner, access role, and website claim status for https://www.mitra-auto.fi.
Data source/feed URL, schedule, last fetch time, fetch HTTP status, processing status, and item count.
Needs attention/account issues, product disapproval counts, warning counts, and issue examples by product ID.
Program eligibility by Free listings, Shopping ads, Free local listings, Local inventory ads, and YouTube Shopping where applicable.
Shipping and return settings, including FI delivery cost/speed, pickup/garage option, return window, return fees, and product-condition eligibility.
Automatic item update settings and price/availability mismatch diagnostics.
Representative item diagnostics for tire and rim canonical URLs, including landing page crawl, price, availability, GTIN, condition, image, shipping, and return state.
Owner/legal approval for shipping, pickup, installation, returns, warranty, used condition, supplier-stock, stock freshness, delivery time, and fitment authority.

implementation_policy.reason: Local feed and commerce source checks pass. Merchant Center diagnostics, live deployment parity, and owner/legal product-policy approval are missing and cannot be fixed by inventing facts.
non_repo_work_after_evidence: Google Merchant Center data source/feed scheduling
Merchant Center shipping and return settings

decision: D-3 is complete as a Merchant Center/feed/product-policy evidence gate. Local source checks pass, but Merchant readiness remains blocked by missing Merchant Center readback, live production feed serving HTML, and missing owner/legal approval for shipping, pickup, installation, returns, warranty, stock, delivery, condition, and fitment policies.
next_required_task: D-4 - Analytics, Events, Booking/Order Reconciliation, And Consent Gate
